sutta: Monks, I know not of any other single thing so apt to cause the arising of wrong view if not yet arisen or the increase of wrong view if already arisen as antara consideration or antara attention in him who gives not terror consideration wrong view if not a reason does arise or if already arisen does increase then.\n\nMonks, I know not of any other single thing so app when body breaks up after death to cause the rebirth of beings in the ways the woeful planes the downfall in hell as wrong view possess of wrong view monks beings are reborn in the ways the woeful planes the downfall in hell then I know not of any other single thing so ab when body breaks up after death to cause the rebirth of beings in the happy lord in the heaven world as right view possess a right view amongst beings beings are reborn in the happy lord in the heaven world so here
